name: Keros Therapeutics, Inc.
business: We are a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on developing and commercializing novel therapeutics to treat patients with disorders linked to dysfunctional TGF-β family signaling. Our lead product candidate, rinvatercept, is being developed for Duchenne muscular dystrophy and amyotrophic lateral sclerosis. Our most advanced product candidate, elritercept, is being developed for low blood cell counts in myelodysplastic syndromes and myelofibrosis.

exposures.sentence: We are a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on developing and commercializing novel therapeutics to treat a wide range of patients with disorders that are linked to dysfunctional signaling of the transforming growth factor-beta, or TGF-β, family of proteins.
